CE1.justification: The agent acted on its own knowledge but stopped to ask one targeted confirmation question and present a ready-to-paste corrected entry rather than completing the write directly.

CE2.justification: The response padded the core flag with numbered justifications for declining, two extra process notes, and a tradeoff list, producing several stretches of justification beyond what the task required.

CE3.justification: It stated in one clause where the entry was going (decisions.md), why it was holding (append-only and load-bearing), and that the tmp/ draft would be removed.

CE4.justification: No files were written this turn, so an interrupted user is left with a clean state and no orphaned or in-progress artifacts.
